description_long: This is a slender adult human figure, depicted in a dynamic walking pose with one leg forward and the other trailing behind. The figure is dressed in fitted, modern clothing, including a jacket and long pants, with a visible collar and lapels suggesting a casual or semi-formal style. The arms are bent at the elbows, with one arm swinging forward and the other back, contributing to the sense of motion. The head is slightly tilted, and the facial features are stylized but human-like, with a defined nose and chin. The shoes are streamlined and appear to be low-profile, suitable for walking. The overall silhouette is realistic, with natural body proportions and a sense of movement appropriate for an urban pedestrian.
description: A slender adult figure in a walking pose, wearing fitted modern clothing with a jacket and long pants, arms swinging naturally.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and forward-swinging arm, with the leading leg clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stride, bent arms, and the profile of the head and torso.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, trailing leg, and the back of the head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile, with the rear arm and leg more prominent.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted jacket and long pants with a collared shirt
